message:
chore: ignore Vercel build artifacts in ESLint config

Add .vercel/** and packages/**/.vercel/** to ESLint ignore patterns.
These directories contain generated build artifacts that may include
minified bundles which trigger false ESLint warnings.

Similar to the existing playwright-report/** exclusion pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,6 +11,9 @@ export default [
       'packages/tui/**',
       '**/packages/tui/**',
       '.cache/**',
+      // Vercel build artifacts (generated; may contain minified bundles)
+      '.vercel/**',
+      'packages/**/.vercel/**',
       // Playwright artifacts (generated; can contain minified bundles)
       'playwright-report/**',
       'test-results/**',
